mapper.select: /* SQL ID : AttachFileDAO.selectAtflByAtflId 설 명 : 첨부파일조회 (by AtflId) */ SELECT A.* , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_ATFL WHERE SRC_ATFL_ID = A.ATFL_ID AND SRC_ATFL_ID IS NOT NULL) AS REF_ATFL_CNT FROM TB_LMS_ATFL A WHERE ATFL_ID = #{atflId}

/* SQL ID : AttachFileDAO.selectAtflListByAtflId 설 명 : 첨부파일목록조회 (by RefId) */ SELECT A.* , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_ATFL WHERE SRC_ATFL_ID = A.ATFL_ID AND SRC_ATFL_ID IS NOT NULL) AS REF_ATFL_CNT FROM TB_LMS_ATFL A WHERE REF_ID = #{refId} ORDER BY ATFL_SEQNO
/* SQL ID : AttachFileDAO.deleteAtfl 설 명 : 첨부파일삭제 */ DELETE FROM TB_LMS_ATFL WHERE 1=1 AND ATFL_ID = #{atflId}
/* SQL ID : AttachFileDAO.selectAtflRepoList 설 명 : 첨부파일저장소목록 */ SELECT * FROM TB_LMS_ATFL_REPO
